mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, function_code, display_name, category, description, source_type, argument_schema, return_type, example, status, current_version, latest_version, builtin, sort_order, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time

id, tenant_id, function_code, version, implementation_type, bean_name, method_name, argument_schema, return_type, example, release_note, status, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
id, tenant_id, function_code, installed_version, install_status, enabled, source_type, installed_by, installed_time, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time

f.id AS id, f.tenant_id AS tenantId, f.function_code AS functionCode, f.display_name AS displayName, f.category AS category, f.description AS description, f.source_type AS sourceType, f.argument_schema AS argumentSchema, f.return_type AS returnType, f.example AS example, v.implementation_type AS implementationType, v.bean_name AS beanName, v.method_name AS methodName, v.release_note AS releaseNote, f.status AS status, f.current_version AS currentVersion, f.latest_version AS latestVersion, f.builtin AS builtin, f.sort_order AS sortOrder, i.installed_version AS installedVersion, i.install_status AS installStatus, i.enabled AS enabled, i.installed_by AS installedBy, i.installed_time AS installedTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_formula_function f LEFT JOIN ai_formula_function_install i ON i.tenant_id = f.tenant_id AND i.function_code = f.function_code LEFT JOIN ai_formula_function_version v ON v.tenant_id = f.tenant_id AND v.function_code = f.function_code AND v.version = COALESCE(i.installed_version, f.current_version, f.latest_version, '1.0.0') WHERE f.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND f.function_code = #{functionCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM ai_formula_function f INNER JOIN ai_formula_function_install i ON i.tenant_id = f.tenant_id AND i.function_code = f.function_code LEFT JOIN ai_formula_function_version v ON v.tenant_id = f.tenant_id AND v.function_code = f.function_code AND v.version = i.installed_version WHERE f.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND f.status = 'ENABLED' AND i.install_status = 'INSTALLED' AND i.enabled = 1 ORDER BY f.sort_order ASC, f.id ASC

SELECT
FROM ai_formula_function f INNER JOIN ai_formula_function_install i ON i.tenant_id = f.tenant_id AND i.function_code = f.function_code LEFT JOIN ai_formula_function_version v ON v.tenant_id = f.tenant_id AND v.function_code = f.function_code AND v.version = i.installed_version WHERE f.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND i.install_status = 'INSTALLED' ORDER BY f.sort_order ASC, f.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_formula_function ( id, tenant_id, function_code, display_name, category, description, source_type, argument_schema, return_type, example, status, current_version, latest_version, builtin, sort_order, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{functionCode}, #{displayName}, #{category}, #{description}, #{sourceType}, #{argumentSchema}, #{returnType}, #{example}, #{status}, #{currentVersion}, #{latestVersion}, #{builtin}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{createDept}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE display_name = VALUES(display_name), category = VALUES(category), description = VALUES(description), source_type = VALUES(source_type), argument_schema = VALUES(argument_schema), return_type = VALUES(return_type), example = VALUES(example), status = VALUES(status), current_version = VALUES(current_version), latest_version = VALUES(latest_version), builtin = VALUES(builtin), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), remark = VALUES(remark), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)

INSERT INTO ai_formula_function_version ( id, tenant_id, function_code, version, implementation_type, bean_name, method_name, argument_schema, return_type, example, release_note, status, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{functionCode}, #{version}, #{implementationType}, #{beanName}, #{methodName}, #{argumentSchema}, #{returnType}, #{example}, #{releaseNote}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{createDept}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE implementation_type = VALUES(implementation_type), bean_name = VALUES(bean_name), method_name = VALUES(method_name), argument_schema = VALUES(argument_schema), return_type = VALUES(return_type), example = VALUES(example), release_note = VALUES(release_note), status = VALUES(status), remark = VALUES(remark), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)

INSERT INTO ai_formula_function_install ( id, tenant_id, function_code, installed_version, install_status, enabled, source_type, installed_by, installed_time, remark, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{functionCode}, #{installedVersion}, #{installStatus}, #{enabled}, #{sourceType}, #{installedBy}, #{installedTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{createDept}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE installed_version = VALUES(installed_version), install_status = VALUES(install_status), enabled = VALUES(enabled), source_type = VALUES(source_type), installed_by = VALUES(installed_by), installed_time = VALUES(installed_time), remark = VALUES(remark), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
